# Software Development Kit

We provide a Software Development Kit (SDK) in Python to help you interact with the Security Cloud Control APIs.

The SDK can be downloaded from [PyPI](https://pypi.org/).

## Installation

Install the SDK using pip:

```bash
pip install scc-firewall-manager-sdk
```

## SDK Documentation

You can find the SDK documentation at:  
[https://scc-firewall-manager-sdk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/](https://scc-firewall-manager-sdk.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)
